definition: showing a willingness to take surprisingly bold risks
sentence: She was __________ enough to dance in the rain, to leap before she looked, to love without a safety net.

definition: great happiness and exhilaration
sentence: She felt pure __________ when he appeared at her door, dressed like something out of the fairy tale she'd written in her diary.

definition: filled with or characterized by a lively energy and excitement
sentence: Her freshman energy was __________ and uncontainable — she laughed too loud, smiled at everyone, and believed everything would work out.

definition: to fill someone with great delight; to put under a spell
sentence: The moment she saw him across the room, something about him seemed to __________ her completely, as if a spell had been cast.

definition: perfect happiness; great joy
sentence: For one perfect summer, she lived in total __________, too happy to worry about the ending she hadn't yet imagined.

definition: filled with love and admiration for someone or something
sentence: She was utterly __________ with the way he played guitar, the way he never tried too hard, the way he just existed.

definition: sending out light; clearly very happy and healthy
sentence: Even in the stands, she was __________ — the kind of bright that had nothing to do with what she was wearing.

definition: possessing or showing courage or determination
sentence: They were a __________ group of underdogs who kept showing up even when no one believed they had a chance.

definition: vivacious and enthusiastic; giving off bubbles
sentence: Her joy that night was __________ — bubbling up and spilling over in a way that couldn't be contained or explained.

definition: cheerful and optimistic; able to float
sentence: She floated through that first week of high school in a __________ haze of possibility, too hopeful to be afraid yet.

definition: a feeling or state of intense excitement and happiness
sentence: The moment he said those words on the balcony, she felt a wave of __________ she'd never quite find the language for.

definition: to regard or represent as perfect or better than reality
sentence: She had a habit of __________ every boy she fell for, building them up in her mind until they couldn't possibly be real.

definition: fearless; adventurous
sentence: She had been __________ once — the kind of girl who believed in happy endings without needing proof they were possible.

definition: feeling or expressing great happiness and triumph
sentence: The crowd was __________ the night they finally won, filling the stadium with a noise that felt bigger than the moment itself.

definition: attractive and impressive through being richly colorful or sumptuous
sentence: He stood at the end of the aisle looking __________ in the gold evening light, more real than any dream she'd allowed herself.

definition: attractively lively and animated
sentence: Her best friend was __________ and magnetic — the kind of girl who made every room feel more alive just by walking in.

definition: impossible to subdue or defeat
sentence: Despite every obstacle, her spirit remained __________, too stubborn and too sure to give up on what she believed in.

definition: enthusiasm or passion
sentence: She danced with such __________ that night — as if the music was the only thing keeping her from floating off the ground.

definition: a feeling of intense pleasure or joy
sentence: She watched him from across the field in a kind of quiet __________, too overwhelmed to move or speak.

definition: showing fearlessness and determination
sentence: She had once been __________ in love — bold enough to believe in princes and impossible happy endings without hesitation.
